assets: ability to build simple web software

binding_constraints: No niche or differentiated founder edge
Insufficient time budget for discovery and iteration
Core early-revenue paths are explicitly refused
30-day $3000 MRR target is inconsistent with the remaining options

opportunities.title: Async niche audit or implementation offer
opportunities.thesis: The fastest general route to revenue would be a narrow asynchronous service offer, but the user refuses services and outreach so the path is invalid under current rules.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: Some technical operators can turn small repetitive workflow pain into paid fixes faster than non-technical freelancers.
opportunities.why_this_could_fail: The user has banned the exact mechanisms that make this path work: services and outbound demand capture.
validation_plan: Only becomes valid if the user allows asynchronous buyer contact in one channel
Target 5 buyer conversations or 2 paid pilots in 7 days
Stop immediately if the user keeps the no-service rule
kill_criteria: User will not relax the no-service rule
Fewer than 2 strong intent signals after 5 targeted contacts

opportunities.title: Marketplace-first developer micro-tool
opportunities.thesis: A tiny tool listed on an existing marketplace is the lowest-friction product path because it avoids calls and custom outreach, but it is still low-odds for meaningful MRR in 30 days.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user can build a simple product without cash and can borrow some discovery from a marketplace.
opportunities.why_this_could_fail: No niche edge, limited time, crowded categories, and weak iteration speed make traction unlikely.
validation_plan: Choose one marketplace and one narrow workflow
Ship a fake-door listing or landing page in under 90 minutes
Require 50 visits or 5 qualified clicks within 72 hours before building further
kill_criteria: Fewer than 5 qualified clicks in 72 hours
No signups or payments after first exposure
Requires more than one workflow or persona to explain the value

opportunities.title: Constraint-change and edge-building plan before micro-SaaS
opportunities.thesis: The honest best bet is to spend the next 30 days manufacturing a real niche advantage and one low-friction distribution wedge before attempting a micro-SaaS revenue goal.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This path uses the only reliable asset currently available, technical execution, while acknowledging that edge and access must be created first.
opportunities.why_this_could_fail: If the user refuses all forms of validation, contact, and visibility, even edge-building cannot happen.
validation_plan: Pick one weekly workflow pain from personal experience on day 1
Collect 20 pain signals from public forums or marketplaces in 60 minutes on day 2
Publish one fake-door page with pricing and CTA by day 3
Get 50 visits, 5 qualified clicks, 1 payment, or 3 explicit willingness-to-pay replies within 7 days
kill_criteria: Cannot identify one niche workflow with measurable output
Cannot collect 20 pain signals in 60 minutes
No qualified intent signals within 7 days
User refuses to relax at least one of: no outreach, no services, no time, no timeline

rejected_paths.title: Generic AI wrapper
rejected_paths.reason: Weak founder edge, weak defensibility, and no cheap path to customers.

rejected_paths.title: Pure content business
rejected_paths.reason: The user refuses content creation and has no audience to monetize.

rejected_paths.title: Software-first micro-SaaS build
rejected_paths.reason: No validated niche, no buyer access, and not enough time for a full find-build-distribute loop.

next_actions: Drop the 30-day $3000 MRR target under the current constraints
Relax exactly one major constraint, preferably allowing one asynchronous distribution channel
Choose one niche workflow pain from personal experience
Collect 20 public pain signals in 60 minutes
Publish one fake-door page with pricing and CTA within 3 days
Stop if there is no meaningful intent within 7 days
